citations.narrative:
The chinchilla enclosure has vinal wrap around the enclosure for thematic appearance. Several sections of the coating
are chewed around edges and has previously been patched with duct tape which is also now chewed. Chinchilla's are
voracious chewers and potential ingestion of of these items can lead to impaction. These sections of vinal in the
enclosure must be maintained in good repair for the safety of the animal.
Correct by: Feb 15, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n
